leadership.description: Invited by Prof. Varsha (Data Warehousing & Data Management) to join the lab after an impressive semester project on psychological market basket analysis. Led a 30-month behavioral research initiative that yielded three published papers.
achievements: Coordinated interdepartmental research with the Departments of Peace Studies and Biology
Conducted 1,000+ video interviews and collected responses from over 10,000 individuals
Co-authored two Springer publications and one CRC Press chapter
Student Peace Ambassador — 8th World Parliament of Science, Religion & Philosophy, MIT-WPU · UNESCO, March 2022
Runner-Up, IdeaIn10 Presentation Competition — MIT-WPU · IET Pune LN, December 2021
Innovation fund approved ₹1,00,000 for 'Speak It Out' — Smart India Hackathon, March 2022

communityWork.name: Divine Magnitude Organization
communityWork.impact: Member April 24, 2020 – April 2025. Coordinated CSR initiatives and hunger alleviation programs in tier-2 cities across India

communityWork.name: Serene Minds — MIT-WPU
communityWork.impact: Member June 2020 – April 2023. University club focused on meditation and spirituality to promote mental well-being and mindfulness among students
